stayStory.title: The stay
stayStory.text: Louise Marie carries the lighter seaside side of the collection: central Ostend, beach access, and a simple apartment rhythm.

stayStory.title: The story
stayStory.text: The House of Wander narrative ties Louise Marie to a promise from Laurens to Maaike early in their relationship.

stayStory.title: Sleeping setup
stayStory.text: The public listing shows one bedroom with a double bed and a sofa bed.

stayStory.title: The handoff
stayStory.text: The site can explain the stay and guide questions, while Airbnb keeps live booking details safe.

bookingSteps: Use Airbnb to confirm live dates, price, cancellation policy, and final availability.
Select the correct guest count, with 4 guests maximum as the current public maximum.
Keep payment and guest-host messaging inside Airbnb until a direct booking layer is approved.
Use House of Wander for story, comparison, guidance, and source-labelled decision support.
houseNotes: Smoke alarm listed; nearby water body noted.
locationNote: Louise Marie is positioned in Ostend near the city centre and beach. The source docs also mention a Bonferia/Vakantiewoning.org reference that should be confirmed before any direct-book parity table goes live.

amigoPrompts.label: What is Louise Marie?
amigoPrompts.answer: Louise Marie is the Ostend seaside apartment in the collection, with a romantic House of Wander origin story, public Airbnb proof, pet-friendly setup, and space for up to 4 guests.

amigoPrompts.label: Can I bring a pet?
amigoPrompts.answer: The public Airbnb listing marks pets as allowed. Exact pet conditions, fees, and exceptions should still be confirmed on Airbnb before booking.

amigoPrompts.label: How do I book?
amigoPrompts.answer: Use House of Wander to understand the stay, then Airbnb for live dates, price, cancellation, payment, and host messaging.
